specializations: Nano TiO2 dispersions for high transparency
Nano ZnO dispersions for cosmetically elegant formulations
product_highlights: Extensive range of non-nano TiO2 and ZnO for regulatory compliance
High-transparency nano dispersions for cosmetically elegant sunscreens
Multiple carrier options (water, oil, silicone) for formulation flexibility
Attenuation grade dispersions for optimal UV performance
Strong technical support and formulation expertise
notes: US-based specialist in mineral UV filter dispersions with one of the most comprehensive ranges of TiO2 and ZnO dispersions in the industry. Kobo's non-nano dispersions address regulatory requirements in markets restricting nano materials, while their high-transparency nano dispersions solve the whitening challenge in mineral sunscreens. Multiple carrier options provide formulation flexibility. Essential supplier for mineral sunscreen development.
